Unggah akun\/stok Anda secara massal di: Upload your accounts/stock in bulk on the Account Stock menu. Newly uploaded accounts will enter Quarantine (*Save Account*) status.
Stok Anda akan otomatis berpindah ke sta: Your stock will automatically move to Ready status after the quarantine cooldown expires. You can set a custom quarantine time in the Settings menu.

Setiap pembeli membeli stok Anda, Anda m: Every time a buyer purchases your stock, you receive a Telegram notification and the funds go into your Wallet balance after deducting the platform fee. You can request a withdrawal in the Wallet & Finance menu.
